subject: Fix pom.xml file
commit_message:
Fix pom.xml file

Add repository and distribution management, Remove att nexus references, add nexus.proxy property

Change-Id: I51ca6fd310d0b36b9749e6d22416fc12b12e4711
Issue-ID: SDC-1313
Signed-off-by: Stone, Avi (as206k) <as206k@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-dcae-d-dt-be-main-master-verify-java/1/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.sdc.dcae.property:DCAE-DT-PROPERTY:jar:1806.0.1-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.sdc.dcae:dcae_dt_be_main:pom:1806.0.1-SNAPSHOT.
